title: Implement Prism KeybindInput
description: Create a game-settings-specific keybind capture control. It should capture keyboard/gamepad input clearly, stay neutral by default, support disabled/readOnly behavior, and avoid behaving like a generic text input.

title: Implement Prism Carousel
description: Implement a game-friendly rotating/scrolling content selector, not a marketing-site carousel. Consider controller/mouse affordances, paging, and restrained motion using existing motion tokens.

title: Implement Prism Tag component
description: Implement Tag as a small game-UI label/status marker. User prefers Tag naming and dislikes chips/badges/pills framing. Use neutral defaults and slot/style escape hatches where needed.

title: Add pre-motion styleOverrides to Button and Select
description: Expose typed component-local visual style override callbacks for Button and Select so consumers can customize stateful visuals before useMotion without adding a generic recipe/styled framework.
acceptance_criteria: Button and Select expose typed styleOverrides; overrides run before useMotion; slotProps remain raw post-motion winners; Button and Select playground stories demonstrate custom animated visuals; npm test/typecheck/lint/build pass.

title: Add first-class controller UI selection support
description: Implement full Roblox gamepad/Xbox UI selection support across Prism interactive components. Acceptance criteria: define a first-class navigation/focus API or documented slot pattern; support Selectable plus SelectionOrder/NextSelection* wiring for Button, Pressable, Checkbox, Switch, Input, KeybindInput, SegmentedControl, StepperInput, Slider, Select, Menu, and Draggable where applicable; decide how overlays/dropdowns/menus enter and restore GuiService.SelectedObject; add playground or smoke coverage for controller navigation; document escape-hatch behavior for raw slotProps versus managed Prism support.

title: Track Fallow cleanup backlog
description: Parent epic for turning the latest npm run fallow advisory output into tracked cleanup work. The scan currently fails on dead-code, duplication, and health thresholds, while overall maintainability remains good.
acceptance_criteria: Fallow findings are represented by child beads; each child bead is resolved or explicitly superseded; npm run fallow output no longer contains the tracked issue category or has documented suppressions.

title: Resolve Fallow unused file findings
description: Fallow reports three files as unreachable from configured entry points: src/lib/components/_shared/PortalLayer.tsx, src/lib/components/_shared/useTriggerOverlayLayout.ts, and src/playground/KeybindInputPlayground.tsx. Determine whether each should be removed, wired into a real entry point, or suppressed with justification.
acceptance_criteria: Each reported unused file is removed, imported by an intended entry point, or documented with a narrow fallow suppression; npm run fallow no longer reports these three files as unused.
close_reason: Resolved unused-file findings by deleting stale shared wrapper files and making standalone playground files explicit Fallow entries.

title: Reduce internal clone groups in LuauBridge
description: Fallow reports fourteen clone groups, about 170 lines, within src/lib/bridge/LuauBridge.tsx. Review repeated prop readers, render branches, and conversion helpers for extraction while keeping the bridge schema behavior stable.
acceptance_criteria: LuauBridge internal clone groups are reduced or each remaining group is justified; bridge smoke coverage or representative playground mounting confirms behavior; Fallow reports fewer LuauBridge clone groups.

title: Consolidate small media and visual style clone families
description: Fallow reports smaller clone families across Box/Image, Icon/Image, and Input/Select styles. Audit these repeated size, image, icon, and visual-style helpers for shared utilities only where the abstraction remains clear.
acceptance_criteria: Small media/style clone families are reduced or explicitly left in place with rationale; no public component behavior changes; Fallow clone output for Box/Image, Icon/Image, and Input/Select styles is improved or documented.

title: Split TooltipBase high-complexity implementation
description: Fallow's top refactoring target is src/lib/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx: TooltipBase is 270 lines with critical complexity. Split behavior into smaller helpers/components while preserving trigger-anchored overlay behavior, portal mounting, placement, hover/focus/touch interactions, and public props.
acceptance_criteria: TooltipBase complexity and size are materially reduced; Tooltip story or playground smoke test verifies visible tooltip behavior; npm run typecheck, lint, build, and fallow are rerun with improved Tooltip metrics.

title: Split ModalBase screen-overlay complexity
description: Fallow flags src/lib/components/Modal/Modal.tsx as a hotspot and critical complexity risk: ModalBase is 408 lines with high cyclomatic and cognitive complexity. Extract size resolution, backdrop/portal behavior, focus/close interactions, and panel rendering into smaller units without changing the Modal API.
acceptance_criteria: ModalBase size and complexity are materially reduced; modal open/close/backdrop behavior is smoke tested through the matching playground/story surface; normal quality gates pass and Fallow Modal metrics improve.

title: Split high-impact shared style resolution helpers
description: Fallow ranks src/lib/components/_shared/useResolvedStyleProps.ts as high impact because many components depend on it and functions such as mergeSharedStyleProps and useResolvedStyleProps exceed complexity thresholds. Split or simplify shared style resolution carefully to avoid broad component regressions.
acceptance_criteria: Shared style helpers are smaller and easier to test; representative dependent components still typecheck and render; fallow health for useResolvedStyleProps.ts improves without broad API churn.

title: Reduce large control component function sizes
description: Fallow reports many very large component functions, including StepperInputBase, SliderBase, DraggableComponent, KeybindInputBase, TabsBase, ButtonBase, SelectBase, and PopoverBase. Triage and split these into focused child refactors, prioritizing behavior-heavy controls with clear smoke surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: A prioritized breakdown exists or the largest control functions are split directly; each touched public component has matching smoke/playground verification; Fallow large-function output is reduced or follow-up beads are created for remaining controls.

title: Triage Fallow hotspot files
description: Fallow reports four churn/complexity hotspots: src/lib/components/Modal/Modal.tsx, src/lib/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx, src/lib/bridge/LuauBridge.tsx, and src/playground/main.client.ts. Review whether existing cleanup beads cover each hotspot and create narrower follow-ups for any risk not covered.
acceptance_criteria: Each hotspot has an owner bead or documented rationale for no action; completed cleanup improves or intentionally suppresses the hotspot signal; bd links/notes make the remaining risk visible.

title: Resolve Fallow unused export findings
description: Fallow reports unused exports in layering.tsx, StepperInput/utils.ts, useResolvedStyleProps.ts, and StoryTheme re-exports. Audit each export for public API intent, internal usage gaps, and safe removal versus suppression.
acceptance_criteria: Unused export and type-export findings are eliminated or justified with narrow suppressions; public API removals are reflected in barrel files and docs/tests where applicable; npm run fallow no longer reports the tracked export findings.
close_reason: Resolved unused export and type-export findings by privatizing locally-used helpers, removing unused story/shared type re-exports, and dropping an unnecessary Slider GuiZIndex re-export.

title: Audit unused Roblox and lint devDependencies
description: Fallow reports unused devDependencies: @rbxts/compiler-types, @rbxts/fusion, @rbxts/iris, @rbxts/roact, @rbxts/types, @rbxts/vide, @typescript-eslint/parser, and eslint-plugin-roblox-ts. Confirm whether these are toolchain/runtime requirements, optional ecosystem peer support, or removable package metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Each reported dependency is removed, moved, referenced by configuration that Fallow can see, or documented/suppressed with rationale; lockfile/package metadata stay consistent; npm run fallow no longer reports unjustified unused devDependencies.
close_reason: Removed unused Fusion/Iris/Roact/Vide devDependencies; documented required TypeScript/ESLint/roblox-ts tooling dependencies in Fallow ignoreDependencies.

title: Extract shared overlay substrate for Popover and Tooltip
description: Fallow reports related clone groups across src/lib/components/Popover/Popover.tsx and src/lib/components/Tooltip/Tooltip.tsx. These are both trigger-anchored overlays and should be reviewed for shared layout, portal, interaction, and panel rendering substrate without changing public behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Popover and Tooltip duplicated blocks are reduced through an existing or new shared helper where appropriate; behavior is covered by smoke/playground verification; npm run fallow reports fewer or no Popover/Tooltip clone groups.
close_reason: Extracted shared trigger-anchored overlay layer for Popover and Tooltip, split their overlay surface rendering, mounted combined overlay smoke test, and verified typecheck/lint/build plus reduced Fallow duplication.

title: Extract shared binary control substrate for Checkbox and Switch
description: Fallow reports seven clone groups, about 231 lines, across Checkbox and Switch. Audit the shared binary-control concerns such as visual state resolution, input handling, disabled/loading/readOnly behavior, and common decorators.
acceptance_criteria: Checkbox and Switch share appropriate helper code or components without changing their API; representative stories/smoke coverage still works; Fallow clone groups across these files are materially reduced.

title: Extract shared action trigger code for Button and Select
description: Fallow reports three clone groups, about 65 lines, across Button and Select. Review shared trigger styling, pressability, icon/text layout, and interaction-state code for a focused helper that preserves each component's public API.
acceptance_criteria: Button and Select duplicated action-trigger blocks are reduced or explicitly justified; typecheck and relevant smoke coverage pass; Fallow reports fewer Button/Select clone groups.

title: Extract shared collection navigation patterns for Tabs and SegmentedControl
description: Fallow reports three clone groups, about 100 lines, across SegmentedControl and Tabs. Review shared tab/segment value selection, indicator layout, child rendering, and interaction-state handling for reusable primitives.
acceptance_criteria: Tabs and SegmentedControl duplication is reduced through shared code where behavior aligns; keyboard/controller and selection behavior remain intact; Fallow reports fewer clone groups between the files.

title: Extract shared progress rail helpers for Progress and Slider
description: Fallow reports four clone groups, about 78 lines, across Progress and Slider. Review track/fill sizing, color resolution, orientation handling, and rail rendering for reusable helpers without mixing interactive slider capture concerns into Progress.
acceptance_criteria: Progress and Slider duplicate rail/rendering code is reduced where concerns genuinely match; slider drag behavior and progress display remain unchanged; Fallow reports fewer Progress/Slider clone groups.

title: Extract shared layout alignment helpers for Draggable and Stack
description: Fallow reports seven clone groups, about 150 lines, across Draggable and Stack. Review duplicated horizontal/vertical alignment and flex layout resolution code for a shared layout utility that does not couple drag ordering behavior to Stack.
acceptance_criteria: Duplicated alignment/flex helpers are shared or justified; Draggable ordering behavior and Stack layout behavior remain unchanged; Fallow reports fewer Draggable/Stack clone groups.

title: Implement Prism NotificationStack
description: Implement stacked transient game UI notifications/toasts. Handle placement, z-index policy, lifecycle timing, and motion. Reuse screen overlay/layering policy without coupling to trigger-anchored overlays.

title: Implement Prism Tabs distinct from SegmentedControl
description: Implement Tabs for content navigation later in the roadmap. Keep it distinct from SegmentedControl, which is for visible game-settings option selection. Avoid SaaS tab aesthetics; make it fit Roblox/game UI.
close_reason: Implemented Prism Tabs with data-driven consumer API, story, smoke test, and live Studio validation

title: Implement Prism Popover anchored surface
description: Build Popover next as a trigger-anchored content surface on top of shared layering seams (LayerPortal/useTriggerOverlayLayout/useOverlayLocalPosition/usePortalTarget). Use Tooltip and SelectDropdown as reference patterns. Avoid a generic overlay mega-abstraction; Popover should become the substrate for Menu/ContextMenu and other anchored surfaces.
close_reason: Implemented Popover anchored surface component with public exports, story, type coverage, Luau bridge support, and Tooltip conflict cleanup.

title: Implement Prism Menu on Popover
description: Build Menu after Popover, using Popover rather than duplicating overlay/layering logic. Preserve game-UX direction, mouse/keyboard/controller affordances where appropriate, and slotProps escape hatches.

title: Clean up Prism Dialog/Modal layering
description: Move over/clean up Dialog or Modal after Popover/Menu groundwork. Align with shared layering where appropriate while keeping screen-overlay behavior distinct from trigger-anchored overlays.
